goal: Build a fully working Discord bot using discord.js v14. The bot should have slash commands registered on startup using REST API. Commands: /ping (shows bot latency and API latency), /help (shows all available commands with descriptions in an embed), /roll [sides] (rolls a dice with 1-100 sides, default 6), /avatar [user] (shows a user's avatar as an embed). Load the bot token and client ID from a .env file (BOT_TOKEN and CLIENT_ID) using dotenv. Use GatewayIntentBits.Guilds. Handle the interactionCreate event to dispatch commands. Handle the ready event to log bot startup. Each command is its own file in src/commands/ping.ts, src/commands/help.ts, src/commands/roll.ts, src/commands/avatar.ts. Export a data (SlashCommandBuilder) and execute(interaction) from each. Main entry point src/index.ts loads all command files, registers them via REST, then starts the bot. Include error handling for unknown commands. Write a complete README with setup instructions, how to get a bot token, set BOT_TOKEN and CLIENT_ID in .env, invite the bot, and run with bun src/index.ts

files.purpose: Main bot entry point with createBot export and bot initialization
REST API handler for slash command registration
/help command handler for displaying command list
/avatar command handler for user avatar display
Event handler for processing slash commands
Event handler for bot ready status
Unit tests for core bot functionality
Project configuration with dependencies and scripts
Environment variables for bot token and other secrets
